code:
import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next_color(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn label(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut state = Color.Red
mut i = 0
mut token_start = -1

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if token_start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(input, token_start, i)
      if tok == "next"
        state = next_color(state)
      end
      token_start = -1
    end
  else
    if token_start < 0
      token_start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if token_start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(input, token_start, n)
  if tok == "next"
    state = next_color(state)
  end
end

println(label(state))
